# Skill spec
Look in the active document and replace any card Ids that match the pattern "0074718689" with the matching card Id that instead follows the pattern "SET_NNN" from our generated dictionaries. Find the right card Id by the commented name next to it. If a comment is missing, or if you are unsure, then just fill it in with "SET_NNN" and i can fix it later.

# History
each time the skill is run, log each successful mappiing in a new markdown section below. I have started one as an example, but add new double hash (##) headers after it with timestamp. This will act as a cache for the agent to reference before looking up
